ValidationRule.description: The Time Tracker can only track time for himself if not permission set available
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, Timetracker__r.User__r.Id <> $User.Id, $User.CanTrackTimeForOthers__c =false, TimeValidatedHumanResources__c =false, TimeValidatedProjectResponsible__c = false, OR( ISNEW() , ISCHANGED(Timetracker__c), ISCHANGED(DateFrom__c), ISCHANGED(DateUntil__c), ISCHANGED(DurationHhMm__c), ISCHANGED(DurationHhMmN__c), ISCHANGED(OutOfScope__c), ISCHANGED(Description__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not add tor edit ime for somebody else. (TC004)
